0: TEZT-STAR — battery 5, reference resolution via star=True. Fixture test-refs.json contains leaf strings that match the reference syntax (name, name:address, name:address:attention) plus controls (plain text, unresolvable name). The block_loader resolves 'other' to test-other.json. Each test reads a point and observes either the verbatim leaf (star=False) or the resolved value (star=True). Run via run-tezt.py.

1.0: Control: star=False. Reference leaf at '1' returns verbatim 'other' — no resolution.
1.2: Mode=point, text='other' (the literal leaf string). No resolution attempted.

2.0: Star=True at bare name. Leaf 'other' resolves via block_loader to the whole 'other' block — zand(other_block, number=None) returns mode=whole.
2.2: Mode=point, text=nested zand result with mode=whole. Contains 'OTHER ROOT', 'first leaf of other', 'second branch voicing'.

3.0: Star=True at name:address. Leaf 'other:1' resolves to zand(other_block, '1') — spindle default (no attention in the reference).
3.2: Mode=point, text=nested zand spindle from other:1. Contains 'first leaf of other'.

4.0: Star=True at name:address:attention=point. Leaf 'other:1:0' resolves to zand(other_block, '1', attention=0) — point at other's first leaf.
4.2: Mode=point, text=nested zand point. Contains 'first leaf of other'.

5.0: Star=True resolves to a branch via zero-text. Leaf 'other:2:0' returns point at other's second branch (voiced via zero-spine).
5.2: Mode=point, text=nested zand point with text 'second branch voicing of other'.

6.0: Star=True resolves to a directory. Leaf 'other:2:-1' returns zand(other_block, '2', attention=-1) — directory descending one level from other's branch 2.
6.2: Mode=point, text=nested zand directory. Subtree contains 'second branch voicing of other' (at 0) and 'deep leaf at other:2,3' (at 3).

7.0: Star=True on non-reference leaf. 'just plain text, no reference' doesn't match reference syntax — returned verbatim.
7.2: Mode=point, text='just plain text, no reference' (unchanged).

8.0: Star=True on unresolvable reference. 'nonexistent:1' parses as a reference but block_loader returns None — reference returned verbatim.
8.2: Mode=point, text='nonexistent:1' (unchanged because target block unloadable).

9.0: Control: star=False on plain text. Confirms star defaults to False and doesn't interfere with non-reference leaves.
9.2: Mode=point, text='just plain text, no reference'. Same as test 7 — star=True or =False has no effect on non-references.
